pr.title: Non-record: 1.8184 BPB Single-step Recurrent Transformer with Q-LoRA (Windows 3090)

output.summary: Wide single-pass transformer on RTX 3090 swaps recurrence for near-full-rank dual-Q LoRA to maximize steps under 10-minute caps while staying INT8-friendly.
techniques: Single-pass wide transformer to boost throughput under 10-minute RTX 3090 runs
Near-full-rank dual-Q LoRA adapter derived from lora_rank=512 for richer query space
INT8-aware instrumentation with best-checkpoint saving and dynamic scaling
